NAME: winnerscurse
DESCRIPTION: This package, winnerscurse, has been designed to provide easy access to published methods which aim to correct for Winner’s Curse, using GWAS summary statistics.
MANUAL_CITATION: Forde A (2022). winnerscurse: Winner's Curse Adjustment Methods for GWAS Summary Statistics. R package version 0.1.1, https://amandaforde.github.io/winnerscurse/.
